name: com.towerui.runtime
description: C# runtime bridges for TowerUI — React TSX game UI framework powered by Puerts + Unity UGUI.
_comment: Puerts (com.tencent.puerts.core + com.tencent.puerts.v8/quickjs) is REQUIRED but not listed in dependencies because it is not available on the Unity Package Registry. Install Puerts manually from: https://github.com/nicenlove/puerts/releases
